note: design↔live anchor map for the Tools destination (rail label 'Tools', slug `connectors`). DESIGN = ConnectorsSurface, design-kit/app-v3/copilot-app.jsx:43-71 over the CONNECTORS fixture (copilot-data.jsx:131-138), plus ConnectModal (copilot-flows.jsx:186-268) for state `connect`. LIVE = packages/chat-surface/src/destinations/connectors/{ConnectorsDestination,ConnectorCard,AccessModeSegment,ConnectModal}.tsx as composed by the WEB host, apps/frontend/src/features/connectors/ConnectorsRoute.tsx:544-620. NAMING TRAP: this is NOT destinations/tools/ in the live app — slug `connectors` carries profileLabel 'Tools'; slug `tools` is labelled 'Skills'. LIVE SELECTORS ARE data-testid/attribute-based ON PURPOSE: the whole connectors subtree styles with inline React CSSProperties and emits ZERO css classes (grep 'class="' over surfaces/tools/live/default.html returns 0 hits), so there is no class hook to anchor on. Labels are state-prefixed (login-surface convention) because extract/compare do not filter by state: run the extractor once per state and treat the other state's anchors as expected-unmatched (both sides unmatched → compare skips them). `live: null` rows are REAL absences the comparator must report as HIGH; the only expectDivergence row is the app-shell rail, which is genuinely outside this fixture's frame.

elements.label: default.page.lead
elements.what:
Design: ONE explanatory lead

(12px/--mut/1.6, margin -2px 0 18px, max-width 72ch) carrying both the thesis sentence and the policy hand-off link. Live SPLITS that copy in two — the thesis sentence became PageHeader's subtitle (TOOLS_SUBTITLE, ConnectorsDestination.tsx:47-49; rendered PageHeader.tsx:110-112) and only the policy sentence survives as this

(ConnectorsDestination.tsx:365-371, style at :477-484). Anchored on the policy

because it is the element that still owns the link.

elements.label: default.page.lead.link
elements.what: Design: inline <a>, accent, text-decoration none (copilot.css:39). Live: a <button> with textDecoration 'underline' + textUnderlineOffset 2 (ConnectorsDestination.tsx:486-496). Same destination (Settings → Model & behavior), different element type and underline treatment.

elements.label: default.section.head
elements.what: 'Connected · 6' mono eyebrow (9.5px/.12em/uppercase/--mut2, copilot.css:1563-1570). PRD-11: the surface now renders the shared <SectionHeader> whose <h2> label carries the `.ui-mono-caps` recipe (mono, --font-size-mono-9-5, uppercase, --tracking-mono-caps) coloured --color-text-subtle (== --mut2) — no 22px page title, no filter-tab count. Anchored on the label element because the design's `.sect-h` IS the mono text node (the CTA is a sibling in a flex wrapper).

elements.label: default.connect.cta
elements.what: 'Connect a tool'. Design: cbtn cbtn--pri cbtn--sm — 11.5px/600, padding 4px 9px, radius 6px. PRD-11 D6: the CTA now uses the design-system `<Button variant='primary' size='sm'>` (.ui-button --primary --sm), whose base `border: 1px solid transparent` matches the design's `.cbtn--pri { border-color: transparent }` — the accent-on-accent border is gone as a consequence of the recipe, not a patch.

elements.label: default.rowlist
elements.what: Container of the connector collection. Design: single hairline card list — bg --panel, 1px --line border, radius 8px, overflow hidden, flex COLUMN (copilot.css:1574-1581). PRD-11 D1: live now renders the shared <RowList> = `.rowlist` (1px --color-border, --radius-md, --color-surface, overflow hidden) — the same layout family, not a borderless card grid.

elements.label: default.row.first

expectDivergence.borderColor: Border-placement artifact of the shared <RowList> primitive (identical to the Activity surface's `row.live` anchor): the design draws the between-row hairline on `.lrow` itself (border-bottom --line), while RowList draws it on the wrapping `<li>` and leaves the row's own border unset (so its measured borderColor defaults to currentColor --tx on all four edges). The hairline is present and visually identical — only the element that carries it differs.

elements.what: First connector (Safe{Wallet}). Design: a 61px-tall <div> row, padding 11px 14px, gap 12px, align-items center, bottom hairline, cursor:default — non-navigable. PRD-11 D1: live now renders the shared <Row> (11px 14px padding, gap 12px, transparent, cursor default); the between-row hairline lives on the <RowList> `<li>` wrapper.

elements.label: default.row.logo
elements.what: 30x30 radius-7 initial tile. copilot.css:1605-1614 !important-forces --panel3/--tx2. PRD-11 D3: live now renders a default <AppIcon size='tile' tone='neutral'> keyed on the slug when no `renderIcon` override is passed — a 30px --radius-md squircle on --color-surface-elevated / --color-text-strong (the neutral tile chrome). The tile no longer depends on a host binding.

elements.label: default.row.name
elements.what: Connector name. Design: 12.5px/500/--tx (copilot.css:1635-1642). PRD-11 D1: live renders the shared <Row> title — --font-size-xs / --font-weight-medium (500) / --color-text (the .lrow__name recipe absorbed by PRD-08 D9).

elements.label: default.row.sub
elements.what: Scope/account metadata ('3-of-5 multisig · Base'). Design: 11px/--mut2 in JetBrains Mono — this surface, unlike ChatRow and ActivitySurface, keeps the mono face (copilot.css:1643-1648). PRD-11 D1: live passes `subFont='mono'` to <Row>, so the sub-line carries var(--font-mono) at --font-size-2xs / --color-text-subtle.

elements.label: default.row.act
elements.what: The row's trailing action cell holding the permission control. Design: flex:none, display flex, align center, gap 9px, at the RIGHT END of the horizontal row (copilot.css:1650-1655). PRD-11: live puts the <AccessModeSegment> in the <Row> `meta` cell (flex:none, inline-flex, gap 9) with no 'Agent access' prefix label.

elements.label: default.seg
elements.expectDivergence: Token-ladder quantization: the group radius stays --radius-md (8px) against the design's 7px because PRD-01 §B refuses to add a 7px rung for a 1px delta, and the outer−inner (8−6) relationship equal to the 2px group padding is preserved. Background is now --color-surface (== --panel), matching the design's lighter-than-page group.
elements.what: 3-way segmented-control container. Design: inline-flex, bg --panel #111114, 1px --line border, radius 7px, padding 2px, gap 2px (copilot.css:708-715). PRD-11 D5: live now sits on var(--color-surface) (== --panel, LIGHTER than the page), matching the design; the only residual is the 8-vs-7 outer radius (declared here).

elements.label: default.seg.selected
elements.expectDivergence: Token-ladder quantization: the inner radius stays --radius-sm (6px) against the design's 5px (same PRD-01 §B ladder policy — no --radius-xs rung for a 1px delta). Everything else is now neutral parity.
elements.what: THE load-bearing anchor. Design selected segment ('Read & act'): bg --panel3 #1d1d23, colour --tx, 12px/500 — NEUTRAL, no accent. PRD-11 D5: live now fills to var(--color-surface-elevated) (== --panel3) at a CONSTANT --font-weight-medium (500) with NO boxShadow ring. The extractor DOES capture boxShadow (lib/extract-computed.js:48), so the removed ring is visible in the report; the only residual is the 6-vs-5 inner radius (declared here).

elements.label: default.seg.unselected
elements.expectDivergence: Token-ladder quantization: inner radius --radius-sm (6px) vs the design's 5px (PRD-01 §B). Weight is now a constant 500 for both states — the type no longer reflows on selection.
elements.what: Unselected segment ('Read'). Design = transparent bg, --mut, metrically IDENTICAL to the selected one save background+colour (copilot.css:716-733). PRD-11 D5: live now holds --font-weight-medium (500) in BOTH states, so the control no longer reflows type weight as selection moves.

elements.label: default.seg.read.selected
elements.expectDivergence: Token-ladder quantization: inner radius --radius-sm (6px) vs 5px (PRD-01 §B). Otherwise neutral parity, per-row bound.
elements.what: The 6th connector (GitHub) is selected on 'Read', not 'Read & act' (perm:'read', copilot-data.jsx:137) — proves selection is bound PER connector row. The live fixture reproduces this (conn_github's segment carries data-value="read") — PRD-06 makes access_mode a required wire field, so the binding is `accessMode={overrides[c.id] ?? c.access_mode}`.

elements.label: default.rail.badge
elements.expectDivergence: OUT OF FRAME, not missing: the rail is app-shell chrome (ChatShell), not part of ConnectorsDestination. The live fixture renders only the destination content area (1172x756 = the design window minus the 48px rail, 38px title bar and 46px topbar), so there is no rail to anchor. Rail-badge parity belongs to the shell audit, not this surface.
elements.what: Rail badge '1' pinned to the Run item on every non-Run destination (copilot-app.jsx:299): min-width 13px accent pill, 8.5px/700 mono, --accent-ink text.

elements.label: connect.scrim
elements.what: Design: portaled into .mw NOT document.body (copilot-flows.jsx:20) — position ABSOLUTE inset 0 inside the 1220x840 window frame, rgba(4,4,6,.66) + 2px backdrop blur, 22px padding, z-index 60. Live: position FIXED, viewport-sized, padding 16px, zIndex 1100, backgroundColor var(--color-scrim, rgb(0 0 0 / 0.54)) (settings/Modal.tsx:138-151, mounted :288-289).

elements.label: connect.modal
elements.what: 500px fixed-width dialog. Design computed 500x604: bg --panel, 1px --line2, radius 12px, shadow 0 26px 70px -18px rgba(0,0,0,.8). Live computed 500x621: bg var(--color-surface) (== --panel), border var(--color-border-strong) (== --line2), borderRadius var(--radius-lg) (12px), boxShadow var(--shadow-soft) (settings/Modal.tsx:302-312). The 17px height delta is the extra footer StepDots row.

elements.label: connect.modal.logo
elements.what: Identity tile in the modal header. Design: 34x34, radius 8, holding a 16px plug SVG (copilot.css:399, !important-forced to --panel3/--tx2). Live: 30x30, borderRadius var(--radius-md) = 8px, bg var(--color-surface-muted), holding a '◆' TEXT glyph rather than an icon (settings/Modal.tsx:160-170).

elements.label: connect.modal.title
elements.what: 'Connect a tool' — design 13.5px/600 display font, letter-spacing -0.135px (-.01em), copilot.css:401. Live uses var(--font-display) + var(--font-size-sm) = 13.6px + var(--font-weight-semibold) + -0.01em (settings/Modal.tsx:174-181) — a deliberate token match noted in-comment at :176. Tag differs (h3 → h2).

elements.label: connect.modal.subtitle
elements.what: Design copy: 'the agent acts through your accounts', 10.5px mono / --mut2, margin-top 2px. Live copy: 'Bring a SaaS source in' at var(--font-mono) + var(--font-size-2xs) = 11.2px / --color-text-subtle (copy at ConnectModal.tsx:294-299, styling at settings/Modal.tsx:183-188). The copy divergence is meaningful: the design's subtitle states the TRUST MODEL, the live one states a task.

elements.label: connect.catalog.row
elements.what: First catalog row (Notion). Design: <button>, padding 10px, 1px --line2 border, radius 8px, margin-bottom 7px, bg --ink2 #0d0d10, gap 10px, trailing 15px chevron, computed 468x58 (copilot.css:414). Live: <button> inside an <li>, padding var(--space-sm) var(--space-md) = 8px 12px, border var(--color-border) (== --line, THINNER tone than the design's --line2), borderRadius var(--radius-md) = 8px, bg var(--color-surface-muted) #16161a, gap var(--space-md) = 12px; the 7px row rhythm moved to the <ul>'s var(--space-sm) gap (ConnectModal.tsx:388-411, pickRowStyle :740-754, listStyle :731-738).

elements.label: connect.catalog.row.logo
elements.what: 28x28 initial tile. Design radius 7px, 11px/600, forced to --panel3/--tx2 by copilot.css:418. Live 28x28 but borderRadius var(--radius-sm) = 6px and backgroundColor var(--color-surface) #111114 — a step DARKER than the --color-surface-muted row it sits on, INVERTING the design's tile-lighter-than-row relationship — and it renders a generic '◆' for every entry instead of the connector initial (ConnectModal.tsx:400-402, glyphStyle :756-766).

elements.label: connect.custom.mcp.row
elements.what: 'Custom MCP server' escape hatch. Design CASCADE TRAP: .mrow--dash/.mrow--pin at copilot.css:101-103 lose to .mrow at :414 (equal specificity, declared earlier), so it computes SOLID border, padding 10px, radius 8px, 468px; only position:sticky, bottom:-15px, margin-top 10px and margin-inline -15px survive. Live: an ORDINARY catalog row — same pickRowStyle as every other entry, no sticky/pinned treatment, no dashed intent (ConnectModal.tsx:347-370). NOTE: this row only exists because the host passes `onAddCustomServer` (ConnectModal.tsx:314) — WEB does (ConnectorsRoute.tsx:613-615), DESKTOP never mounts ConnectModal at all (destinationBinders.tsx:480-490).

elements.label: live.connect.stepdots
elements.expectDivergence: Deliberate live-only affordance: the live connect flow is a real multi-step OAuth round-trip (catalog → OAuth spinner → permission), which needs a progress indicator the instant, non-authorizing design mock does not. The 3-dot footer is intentional and adds the ~17px height delta over the design's single-phase dialog.
elements.what: LIVE-ONLY: a 3-dot step indicator in the modal footer (ConnectModal.tsx <StepDots total={3} …>). The design's ConnectModal has no step affordance in the 'pick' phase because the mock never actually authorizes.
